info.english_meaning: to call outto cryto cry out continuallyto lamentto grieve to shed tears
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: arTaviSeze GawAdiH  zit  (DAtusaNKyA 773 avalokyatAm) 'AhvAne sakarmakaH rodane akarmakaH  'rakzaRe ca' ityeke  ' AhvAne rodane krandeH kandeH krandati kandati  vEklavye tu tayorDAtvoH krandate kandate mitoH'  mittvArTapAWasAmarTyAt tayordIrGavikalpanam  Bavet ciRRamulostasmAt akrAndyakrandi sidDyataH' (Slo. 105-106) iti devaH

upasarga_meanings.meaning: madata mAMganA madata ke lie bulAnA ronA pukAranA

upasargachandrika.example_text: prakrandatiruccErAvAhane vartate taTA cargvede prayogaH 'pra vaH spa L kran' (5.59.1)
'avakranda dakziRato gfhARAm' (f0 2423) mandaM vASyasva anuccE ruvIhi ityuktaM Bavati
'krandate svAhA'vakrandAya svAhA' (vA0 saM0 227) yaTA'nyatra taTeha avaSabdaH kriyAyA uttarapadoktAyA asAkalyamAha
'tfRAgralagnEstuhinEH patadBirAkrandatIvozasi SItakAlaH' (ftu0 47) Akrandati roditi SokASrURi muYcati
'Akrandaya Danapate varam' (aTarva0 2366) Akrandaya santatamaBiDApayetyarTa iti sAyaRaH atrANaH kranda sAtatya iti DAtumaByUhati BAzyakAraH
'jiGAMsudrORimAkrande eka evABiDAvati' (BA0 sO0 122) Akrando dAruRo raRaH ArAve rudite trAtaryAkrando dAruRe raRe (amaraH)
'yuDyante yasyAmAkrando yasyAM vadati dunduBiH' (aTarva0 12141) Akranda ArAvo raRaBerInAdaH
'yAtrAyAM yadi vijYAtamanAkrandamanantaram' (BA0 SAM0 6919) AkrandastrAtA anAkrandam mitrahInam anantaraM banDuhInam
'pArzRigrAhaM ca samprekzya taTA''krandaM ca maRqale' (manu0 7207) Akrando nAma nfpatiryasya vijigIzo rAjyAdekAntaraM rAjyaM (na tvanantaram)
'yadA manyeta nfpatirAkrandena balIyasA pArzRigrAhABiBUto'ristadA yAtrAM prayojayet' (mAtsya pu0 2402)..

'pArzRigrAhaM ca samprekzya taTAkrandaM ca maRqale' (manu0 7207) ihAriM prati yAtasya vijigIzoH pArzRigrAhAt trAtA''kranda uktaH purARavacane tu manAgBedena amaraSca paWati--sArAve rudite trAtaryAkrando dAruRe raRe iti yadyapyamara AkrandaM nirviSezeRa trAtAramAha taTApi manuvacanasaMvAdAyArTasaNkoco bodDavyaH
'aBi kranda pra trAsaya' (aTarva0 5214) aBikranda SabdAyasva vASyasva roruhi
